data.name: Kemopop!
data.detailed_description:
《Kemopop!》是個益智類脫衣遊戲，可愛又易推倒的獸人（福瑞）男孩子服務員們靜等貴客光臨。把使人垂涎的糖果配對上，好好欣賞更多使人垂涎的……你懂的！

  • 獨特設計： 沒有兩個關卡玩法一樣。
  • 手繪原創內容： 所有立繪都是為《Kemopop!》原創的。
  • 畫廊模式： 流覽你已解鎖的立繪，可以設置為壁紙！
  • 嘉賓立繪： 遊玩與獸人畫師合作創作的額外關卡。
  • 通用控制： 可以用滑鼠、鍵盤、觸控式螢幕或手柄進行遊戲！
  • 原創聲帶： 酷炫的節拍會根據你的表現做出反應。
data.about_the_game:
《Kemopop!》是個益智類脫衣遊戲，可愛又易推倒的獸人（福瑞）男孩子服務員們靜等貴客光臨。把使人垂涎的糖果配對上，好好欣賞更多使人垂涎的……你懂的！

  • 獨特設計： 沒有兩個關卡玩法一樣。
  • 手繪原創內容： 所有立繪都是為《Kemopop!》原創的。
  • 畫廊模式： 流覽你已解鎖的立繪，可以設置為壁紙！
  • 嘉賓立繪： 遊玩與獸人畫師合作創作的額外關卡。
  • 通用控制： 可以用滑鼠、鍵盤、觸控式螢幕或手柄進行遊戲！
  • 原創聲帶： 酷炫的節拍會根據你的表現做出反應。
data.short_description: 快樂拼圖，可愛男孩！一個以餐廳為場景的益智類脫衣遊戲。由獸人畫師們製作的獸人遊戲。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

data.name: Kemopop!
data.detailed_description:
Kemopop! is an active puzzle eroge featuring several cute, effeminate kemono ("furry") boys, all working in food service. Match sweets and make them undress...!!!

If you like feminine boys, especially ones who are well-endowed (and sometimes, very well endowed), this is what you've been waiting for. Kemopop! features characters from various artists, in over 30+ stages!!

  • Hand-Drawn Original Content: All artwork was made special for Kemopop!. Play stages made in collaboration with excellent kemono artists!!

  • Photo Mode: Browse the artwork you've unlocked, and use it to generate wallpaper...!

  • Universal Controls: Play with just a mouse, keyboard, touchscreen, or controller!

  • Your Character Here: Do you have artwork of a character and a bit of free time? Put it in the game!

  • Gumball Machine: Unlock additional content: new sweets, another half of the soundtrack, fanart, and developer commentary!!

  • Skip It All: Don't wanna play? Use the Bonus settings to get right to the content!!

data.short_description: Fast puzzles, cute boys~! A food-themed physics puzzler where you undress your waiter. A kemono game, by kemono artists.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
